name_en: 🌸⏩Chanel✨Hot Metal CF Mini Top-Handle Bag Gold Ball AS1786. An extra small gold ball on the chain adds a perfect finishing touch. Not only retro and beautiful, but the chain length is also adjustable. Can be worn as a waist bag or crossbody/shoulder bag. Exquisite and perfect 💕 Love it 🥰🥰 Sold out globally 🤩🤩Size: 17cm
